title: Message SSE state change only refreshes current chat; other chats never updated
description: Trigger: SSE delivers a Message StateChange while the user has any chat other than the target chat open (or no chat open at all). handle_state_change only calls load_messages_for_chat for current_chat. Bad behavior: new messages in non-selected chats are never fetched, so the chat list unread counts (from Chat/changes) may diverge from the actual message list shown when those chats are later opened; users see stale message lists until they switch away and back.
